problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Atomic. Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
